name: Futu/Tiger Brokers Stock MCP Server
what_it_does: Futu/Tiger Brokers MCP server enabling AI agents to access Futu OpenAPI data — fetching Hong Kong and US stock quotes, retrieving order book data and historical prices, accessing portfolio information, and integrating Futu's brokerage data into agent-driven investment analysis workflows for Hong Kong and US markets.
use_cases: Fetching HK and US stock prices from investment research agents
Retrieving real-time order book data from trading analysis agents
Accessing portfolio holdings and P&L from portfolio management agents
Analyzing historical price data for HK stocks from backtesting agents
Monitoring positions and alerts from risk management agents
Building China/HK market investment tools from fintech agents
not_for: Teams without Futu/Moomoo account and OpenAPI access
A-share China domestic stocks (Futu focuses on HK/US markets)
Real-time execution trading (data MCP, not trading execution)
best_when: An agent needs Hong Kong or US stock market data via Futu's OpenAPI — particularly valuable for investors focused on HK-listed Chinese company stocks.
avoid_when: You don't have a Futu/Moomoo brokerage account or need A-share domestic China market data.

auth.notes: Futu OpenAPI requires Futu/Moomoo account with OpenAPI enabled. Requires running FutuOpenD locally as a gateway process. Account verification and OpenAPI activation required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Futu OpenAPI: free for Futu account holders with limitations
pricing.paid_tiers: Futu Pro subscription for advanced data features
pricing.notes: Futu OpenAPI is free for Futu/Moomoo account holders. FutuOpenD gateway must run locally. Community MCP server is free.

known_agent_gotchas: FutuOpenD gateway process must be running locally — extra setup step beyond typical MCP
Futu account with OpenAPI activation required — not automatic on account creation
Limited documentation in English — primarily Chinese-language docs
Community MCP from individual contributor — niche tool for Futu users
HK/US market focus — minimal coverage of A-share or other markets
OpenAPI access level affects data availability — basic vs extended subscription
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local FutuOpenD gateway. Account credentials managed by FutuOpenD separately. Community MCP. Financial account access — use minimum required OpenAPI permissions.

security_score_components.security_notes: FutuOpenD manages account access. Community MCP. Minimum required OpenAPI permissions.
